economic_notes: COVID-19 impacted commercial operations subsequent to year end. FNFA interest relief of $1,072,572 to be received in fiscal 2021. Band operates multiple commercial enterprises including convention centre, gaming, insurance brokers, fisheries, data centre, geomatics, sport and wellness centre, bowling lanes, market, and business centre.
notes: Audit is qualified due to capitalization of intangible assets (fishing licenses and permits $3,447,743) which is a departure from PSAS — accumulated surplus overstated by this amount. Membertou Properties Limited Partnership is accounted for as a GBE on modified equity basis with a net loss of $159,984. The consolidated entity includes 14 subsidiaries. ISC funding amount not separately broken out in the text provided — government transfers total $16,489,969 includes ISC, Health Canada, DFO, Province of NS, ACOA, and others. Long-term debt increased significantly from $71M to $81.5M including a new $7.1M high-interest (12.5%) Bridging Finance loan. COVID-19 subsequent event noted. Schedule A segment disclosure pages were referenced but data not provided in text extract.
